name: Devout

keyHints.bloomText: Given a shrine to their god, they work like the work is worship. It is.

discovery: Seen kneeling at dawn, whatever the weather.

name: Observant
text: Keeps the rites the way you keep a habit — which is to say, mostly.

keyHints.bloomText: Invited to lead one rite, they discover they meant it all along.

discovery: Attends rites; sits at the back.

name: Agnostic
text: The sea left. That settled a few questions, in their view.

keyHints.bloomText: Never pushed to pray, they'll hold the ladder for everyone who does.

discovery: Works straight through the tide-bell. Not spitefully. Just does.

name: Bitter at the Gods

keyHints.bloomText: Someone finally asked what the sea took from them. They talk for an hour, and something loosens.

discovery: Won't step inside the chapel; stands exactly one pace from the door during rites.

name: Industrious
text: Finds the next task before you do.

keyHints.bloomText: Given charge of something, they quietly reorganize it around actually working.

discovery: Their station is tidy at dusk.

name: Steady
text: Same pace in a crisis as on a quiet morning. Both are useful; one is rare.

keyHints.bloomText: A predictable schedule and they become the beam the village hangs on.

discovery: You stop worrying about their station within a week.

name: Idle

keyHints.bloomText: It was never laziness. It was the wrong work. Watch them now.
Useless at noon; a marvel by moonlight. Nobody had asked.

discovery: Three unfinished tasks, one excellent excuse.

name: Burst-Worker
text: Useless on schedules; magnificent in a crisis.

keyHints.bloomText: Named the one who runs TOWARD the storm-bell, they finally have a title that fits.

discovery: Watch them the night the palisade breaks.

name: Storyteller

keyHints.bloomText: Build the fire circle and their tales get longer, and the village's nights get shorter.

discovery: Count who's still at the fire an hour after the meal.

name: Surly
text: Some people are just like this. It isn't a wound and it isn't a warning.

keyHints.bloomText: Never made to smile, they repay you in flawless, silent work.

discovery: First conversation. Possibly the only one.

name: Gossip
text: Knows everything a day early — and tells it a day late.

keyHints.bloomText: Trusted with one real secret and kept faith, they become your best ears instead of your loudest mouth.

discovery: They knew about the priest before the priest arrived.

name: Night-Owl
text: The dark doesn't wake them; the dawn does.

keyHints.bloomText: Moved to the night shift, they thrive — and the night watch stops feeling like punishment duty.

discovery: Lamp oil usage. Just check the ledger.

name: Fears the Dark
text: Grew up on stories from the Drop. Believes every one of them, correctly.

keyHints.bloomText: A lantern of their own, and the fear becomes vigilance — nobody spots trouble at dusk faster.

discovery: Volunteers for anything, as long as it's a day job.

name: Sticky Fingers
text: Things end up in their pockets. Mostly small things. Mostly.

keyHints.bloomText: Made quartermaster — audacity — they guard the stores like their own hoard. Which, in a way, it now is.

discovery: The tally is off by one, three weeks running.

name: Wanderlust
text: Half here. The other half is over the next rise.

keyHints.bloomText: Put on the expedition roster, they come home glowing — and they DO come home, which was the worry.

discovery: Found on the palisade at dusk, looking down-slope.

name: Forge-Sense
text: Reads metal the way priests read weather.

keyHints.bloomText: At a forge, finally, and the whole village's tools quietly improve.

discovery: Watch them handle bronze salvage — they weigh it, listen to it.

name: Keen Eyes
text: Sees the wreck on the horizon before the lookout does.

keyHints.bloomText: On the salvage team, they pay for themselves the first storm.

discovery: They mention the smoke a full minute before anyone else.
